title: Build mixed-node visual proof
goal: Implement the isolated mixed-node marker and detail surface using static seed data before adding MapLibre or APIs.

acceptance.assertion: A mixed node renders weighted aspect segments in deterministic order.
Selecting a mixed node opens a mobile bottom sheet or desktop side panel with aspect-colored cards.
Aspect meaning is visible through text and icons, not color alone, and reduced motion is respected.

metadata.outcome: Static mixed-node visual proof is present on commonworld main and validated.
checks: python3 scripts/validate_contracts.py -> commonworld contract validation ok
python3 scripts/validate_mixed_node_proof.py -> commonworld mixed-node proof validation ok
python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_mixed_node_proof.py tests/test_contracts.py -> 19 passed, 28 subtests passed

verified_acceptance.marker-segments: weighted aspect segments render in deterministic order
verified_acceptance.detail-panel: node selection opens mobile bottom sheet or desktop side panel
verified_acceptance.accessibility: aspect label, icon token, confidence and evidence are visible; reduced motion rule is present
